steps.title: Follow the sequence
steps.content: The passage describes the resurfacing machine's actions in order. It first scraped off the top layer of ice, then sprayed water into grooves, and lastly smoothed the newly formed ice.

steps.title: Reject nonsequential links
steps.content: A signals an example, C signals similarity, and D signals contrast. The blank needs a transition for the middle step in a sequence. The answer is B.
